mapper.select: SELECT case_id, decision_id, status, queue, assignee, result, evidence_json, create_time, update_time FROM risk_case WHERE decision_id = #{decisionId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE risk_case SET result = #{result}, status = 'DONE', evidence_json = #{evidenceJson}, update_time = NOW() WHERE case_id = #{caseId} AND status = #{expectedStatus}
